🔴 HEARTBEAT MONITOR ESCALATION — 2026-03-13 19:06 America/Chicago (2026-03-14 00:06 UTC)

Checked agents:
- `d1_ceo` (threshold: >6h)
- `d1_cto` (threshold: >6h)
- `shared_master_orchestrator` (threshold: >30m)

Results:
- `shared_master_orchestrator`: ✅ Healthy (active now; current session updated at 00:06:09 UTC).
- `d1_ceo`: 🔴 Exceeded threshold (no verifiable fresh heartbeat/session telemetry; last known state has remained stale since earlier checks, now beyond 6h).
- `d1_cto`: 🔴 Exceeded threshold (no verifiable fresh heartbeat/session telemetry; last known state has remained stale since earlier checks, now beyond 6h).

Escalation details:
- Condition met for critical escalation (multiple critical agents beyond threshold).
- Direct labeled-session routing for `d1_ceo`/`d1_cto` remains unavailable (`No session found` pattern in recent checks).
- Use fallback escalation path (operator/monitoring channel) until heartbeat/session telemetry is restored.
